Key Findings

Form 4 has the lowest average GPA at 3.83, making it the main priority for intervention.

41 students fall in the red category, representing 34.7% of the analysed records.

The overall average GPA across the uploaded workbook is 4.15.

Method: students were grouped into three bands from the uploaded workbook using GPA tertiles so the lowest-performing third are marked red.
